prompt:
Subject: Sunset flower field picnic with tiny doppelgangers / golden hour flower picnic

Person/Expression: Young blonde woman with a soft updo, bangs and loose strands swaying naturally for a cute atmosphere, translucent skin, natural makeup, soft smile, gentle gaze at the camera

Clothing/Pose: White lace blouse and pale blue floral skirt, delicate necklace, white sandals, sitting with knees together on a picnic sheet in a natural and cute pose with one hand to her cheek. Surrounding her are tiny chibi versions of herself performing different cute movements like taking photos, holding bouquets, clinging to her feet, offering drinks, reading books, or waving

Background/Light: Japanese riverside park at sunset, distant bridge and cityscape, setting sun reflecting on the river surface, flower field blooming with various colors, picnic basket, glasses, fabric accessories, soft golden backlight, a warm and dreamy atmosphere like the end of summer

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, full-body portrait with the main figure large in the center, 35mm lens, slightly low eye level, shallow depth of field, background riverside and flower field softly blurred while the expressions of the person and tiny doppelgangers are clear

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture visible down to pores, detailed blonde hair flow, delicate fabric texture of the lace blouse and floral skirt, vivid petals and grass, a fantastical photographic expression naturally combining realistic AI portraiture with cute chibi characters, bright and gorgeous tones, magazine photo-like finish

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange gaze, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, broken clothes, duplicate arms, floating person, unnatural little people, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, overexposure, unnatural AI texture, text, logo, watermark
